signature.instructions: Analyze CTA report text to identify acute stroke-related vascular territory and label as NONE, RMCA, LMCA, RACA, LACA, RPCA, LPCA, RPICA, LPICA, BA, RVA, LVA, RICA, LICA, RCA, LCA.

fields.description: Only comma-separated labels from the allowed list. Example: RMCA or NONE.
Exactly one short sentence. No step-by-step reasoning.
